psalm-117-1.verse:
Praise the Lord, all nations;
  Laud Him, all peoples!
psalm-117-1.prayer: Lord, let my life praise You and point all people toward Your goodness, mercy, and truth.

psalm-117-2.verse:
For His lovingkindness is great toward us,
  And the truth of the Lord is everlasting.
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-117-2.prayer: Father, thank You that Your lovingkindness is great and Your truth endures forever. Help me live with gratitude and praise.

psalm-117-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your great lovingkindness and everlasting truth. Let my heart praise You with joy, and let my life reflect Your faithfulness to others. May every nation and every person come to know Your goodness and worship Your holy name.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
